items.claim: Bogdan Guskov finishes a lot of people and is currently on a winning roll.
items.quote: Bogdanuskov finishes a lot of people. He's on a bit of a roll.

items.claim: Bogdan Guskov has been in training camp helping Walter Walker get ready.
items.quote: Bogdan Guskov was talking about how he's been in training camp because he's helping Walter Walker get ready

items.claim: Cody Gibson is way bigger than Abdul Hussein and has a lot of UFC experience.
items.quote: Cody Gibson's way bigger. way bigger and a lot of UFC experience

items.claim: Abdul Hussein is calculated, controls the lead hand well from the southpaw stance, and has strong calf kicks from the orthodox stance.
items.quote: he's calculated. I mean, I like him fighting out of that southpaw stance. He controls your lead hand really well.

items.claim: Abdul Hussein showed good grappling prowess, securing takedowns and escaping bad positions in his fight against Muhammad Mokaev.
items.quote: you could really see the the grappling prowess of Abdul Hussein. He was able to get some takedowns. He was able to get out of some bad positions.

items.claim: Nurullo Aliev made massive improvements in his striking defense and head movement from his UFC debut to his fight against Lacerda.
items.quote: I saw big improvements from his UFC debut to his last fight against Shamrock... He was moving his head off the center line. I saw like massive massive improvements with him

items.claim: Magomed Gadzhiyasulov is a much better wrestler than Brenson Ribeiro and hits just as hard.
items.quote: Magamemed Tuchalov is a much better wrestler. Hits just as hard it looks like as Brenson Heber
Tuchulov is flat on his feet. I don't love how flat Tuilav is.
